_comment_rev2_cross_cutting: Cross-cutting rules from design Section 10a: expiry-day exclusion, gap-day cross-detector exclusion, universe-wide circuit-band exclusion. Implemented in services/universe_filter.py helpers; detectors call them as first-condition prerequisite.
_comment_setups: Wide-open OCI capture for the 7 candidate sub8 detectors (orb_15 redesign + pdh_pdl_reject + 5 new 2026-04-29 detectors). gap_fade_short stays ENABLED as the live validated baseline reference; the 5 new sub8 detectors (pdh_pdl_sweep_reclaim, gap_and_go_continuation, ema5_alert_pullback, camarilla_l3_reversal, expiry_pin_strike_reversal) flipped to enabled=true so the gauntlet can score all 8 candidates from the same capture. Dropped post-Phase-1: mis_unwind_short, closing_hour_reversal (no salvageable cell). Dropped post-Phase-7: cpr_mean_revert, narrow_cpr_breakout, vwap_first_pullback.
